fv3_kinetic_energy_cell.accuracy: O(h^2) (cell-center averaging of D-grid covariant winds)
fv3_kinetic_energy_cell.reference: Harris et al. (2021), GFDL FV3 Technical Memorandum, Eq. 3.5; src/operators/kinetic_energy.jl `fv_kinetic_energy_cell` (imperative reference).
fv3_kinetic_energy_cell.notes: Cell-center kinetic energy from D-grid normalized covariant winds on the non-orthogonal gnomonic grid. KE is bilinear in (u_d, v_d), so it is expressed as a closed-form `expression` over four named operand reads rather than a sum of linear stencil rows. The four reads name the surrounding D-grid faces of cell (i,j); the closed-form math is u_avg = (u_w + u_e)/2, v_avg = (v_s + v_n)/2, KE = (u_avg² + v_avg² − 2·u_avg·v_avg·cos α) / (2·sin²α), where α is the angle between coordinate axes at super-grid position 5 (cell center). The upstream-biased variant of Harris et al. Eq. 6.3 (`fv_kinetic_energy_arrayop` in the imperative reference) evaluates at face positions to dodge the Hollingsworth-Kallberg instability, but its A-grid contravariant fields require a ghost-extension+vector-rotation pre-pass that lives in the cubed_sphere grid accessor (`src/ghost_cells.jl::extend_with_ghosts_vector`) — that pre-pass is below the rule layer.

metric_bindings.comment: Per-cell sub-grid metric resolved by the cubed_sphere grid accessor at super-grid position 5 (cell center). Names match `CubedSphereGrid` field names.
